queries.question: For each assistant, list descriptions of tasks they do.
queries.sql: select assistants.name , tasks.description from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?assistants_tasks a :Assistants_Tasks .
  ?tasks a :Tasks .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasTasks ?tasks .
  ?assistants a :Assistants .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?assistants p:name ?name .
  ?tasks p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each assistant, give me the corresponding task name.
queries.sql: select assistants.name , tasks.task_name from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?task_name WHERE {
  ?assistants_tasks a :Assistants_Tasks .
  ?tasks a :Tasks .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasTasks ?tasks .
  ?assistants a :Assistants .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?assistants p:name ?name .
  ?tasks p:task_name ?task_name .
}

queries.question: What is the task name for each assistant?
queries.sql: SELECT Tasks.task_name  from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id   GROUP BY Assistants_Tasks.task_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Assistants)

queries.question: What are the names and descriptions of the tasks that are shared among all assistants?
queries.sql: SELECT Tasks.task_name, Tasks.description  from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id   GROUP BY Assistants_Tasks.task_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Assistants)

queries.question: For every assistant, show the names and descriptions of the tasks that they are responsible for.
queries.sql: select assistants.name , tasks.task_name , tasks.description from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?task_name ?description WHERE {
  ?assistants_tasks a :Assistants_Tasks .
  ?tasks a :Tasks .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasTasks ?tasks .
  ?assistants a :Assistants .
  ?assistants_tasks p:hasAssistants ?assistants .
  ?assistants p:name ?name .
  ?tasks p:task_name ?task_name .
  ?tasks p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me descriptions of tasks every assistant does.
queries.sql: SELECT Tasks.description  from Assistants_Tasks join Tasks on Assistants_Tasks.task_id = Tasks.id join Assistants on Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id = Assistants.id   GROUP BY Assistants_Tasks.task_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Assistants_Tasks.assistant_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Assistants)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me descriptions of tasks every assistant does.
What is the task name for each assistant?
Give me the names and descriptions of the tasks that each assistant is responsible for.
